name: Microwave German Honey Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 2 quart rectangular glass dish with non-stick coating; set aside.
2. Put butter into a 2 quart glass bowl. Microwave on 30% (medium low) for 2 minutes or until the butter is soft.
3. Cream in sugar; then eggs.
4. Stir in honey.
5. Sift flour together with baking soda, nutmeg, cinnamon, cloves, and ginger.
6. Add the flour mixture, alternately, with water.
7. Add lemon extract and rind.
8. Pour batter into prepared dish.
9. Rotate the dish twice during baking.
10. Microwave on 70% (medium high) for 10 to 12 minutes or until the cake tests done.
11. Serve hot.
